_comment: Skill routing rules. Used by scripts/compile-claude-routing.py to generate a compact routing block. OPT-IN — not installed by default.
_usage: Run: python3 scripts/compile-claude-routing.py --dry-run  to preview output.
_format: Each skill entry supports: name, description, keywords, intentPatterns, filePaths (auto-trigger globs), agentMapping (subagent to invoke alongside), priority (high|medium|low), profile (core|full).

skills.name: git
skills.description: Git operations: commit, push, PR, branch workflows.

skills.name: debugging
skills.description: Systematic bug investigation and root cause analysis.

skills.name: testing
skills.description: Test strategy, writing, TDD, and integration test infrastructure.

skills.name: security
skills.description: Security review, vulnerability checks, OWASP Top 10, comprehensive audits.

skills.name: extend-agent
skills.description: Create new skills, commands, hooks, or subagents.

skills.name: strategic-compact
skills.description: Context management: when and how to /compact strategically.

skills.name: planning
skills.description: Hierarchical project planning, phases, milestones, requirements gathering.

skills.name: api-design
skills.description: REST API design patterns, versioning, error handling.

skills.name: implement-jira-ticket
skills.description: End-to-end Jira ticket implementation with git, tests, approval gates.

skills.name: design-doc-mermaid
skills.description: Create Mermaid diagrams and design documents from text or code.

skills.name: web-deep-search
skills.description: Deep web research with three depth levels via built-in WebSearch + WebFetch.

skills.name: verification-loop
skills.description: Multi-phase verification: build, types, lint, tests, security, diff.

skills.name: pr-review
skills.description: Structured PR and code review across 5 dimensions with severity ratings.

skills.name: postgres-patterns
skills.description: PostgreSQL schema design, indexing, query optimization, RLS.

skills.name: docker-patterns
skills.description: Docker multi-stage builds, Compose, container security.

skills.name: deployment-patterns
skills.description: CI/CD, GitHub Actions, health checks, rollback strategies.

skills.name: ralph-orchestrator
skills.description: Autonomous PRD-to-code pipeline with parallel batch execution.
